ST. #ffr^Wt(^)/2014-99] ft«m:- *jeT f^T^PT «TR?T % 7FJ1W 3TOM^T, *TTT II, 13*5 3, ^R33.(i) *f 3|RNJTHI tf. ^ . ^ . 1 ^ 61 (3T) flrtta, 27 ^Rc^t, 2015 5KTH*lf5ldt^T R0'l 2983GI/2015 (1) -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] MINISTRY OF COMMUNICATIONS AND INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY (Department of Electronics and ^formation Technology) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 30th June, 2015 G.S.R. 539(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (4) of section 3 A of the Information Technology Act, 2000 (21 of 2000), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules to amend the Second Schedule to the said Act, namely:— 1. (1) These rules may be called the Electronic Signature or Electronic Authentication Technique and Procedure (Amendment) Rules, 2015. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the information Technology Act, 2000 (2i of 2000), in the Second Schedule, under column number (3), in item (b), the words "on hardware security module" shall be omitted. [No. CCA/DC (T)/2014-99] TAP AN RAY, Additional Secy. Note. The principal rules were published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, and Section 3, Sub-section (i), vide notification number G.S.R. 61(E), dated the 27th January, 2015. Printed by the Manager, Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
